business_ideas.idea: Cosme: mini dome entertainment venue showing sports with immersive IMAX-style experience
Innovation in sleepy industries: cookware, appliances, home goods with modern branding and marketing
HexClad: hybrid nonstick/stainless cookware with distinctive hexagon design and celebrity backing
Shark Ninja model: bootstrap consumer appliance company with rapid scaling and product innovation
Smart kitchen appliances with AI (June oven with bagel recognition) for high-AOV customers

predictions.text: Sleepy industries with large markets and low innovation are best opportunities for founder success
Brand marketing and influencer backing can drive significant valuations even in commodity categories
Consumer products with high AOV and good branding can achieve hundreds of millions in revenue
